title: Figure 16 from: Rathnayaka AR, Chethana KWT, Manowong A, Bhagya AT, Win H, Tun ZL, Mapook A, Hyde KD (2025) Taxonomy, phylogeny, and bioactive potential of Xylariales (Sordariomycetes, Ascomycota) from Thailand: novel species discovery, new host and geographical records, and antibacterial properties. MycoKeys 120: 35-117. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.120.155915
author: Rathnayaka, Achala R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 16 Hypomontagnella monticulosa on a dead branch of Macaranga peltata (MFLU 24-0531, a new host record). a. Substrate; b, c. Appearance of mature stroma on the host; d. A horizontal section through ascomata; e. Paraphyses; f–i. Asci; j. Apical apparatus stained blue with Melzer's reagent; k–n. Ascospores; o. A germinated ascospore; p, q. Colony on the PDA (p upper, q lower). Scale bars: 2 mm (b); 500 μm (c); 200 μm (d); 20 μm (e–i); 10 μm (j, o); 5 μm (k–n).
